control_pdfua_notes: The PDF's document properties don't have a proper title set, or the PDF is configured to show the filename in the title bar instead of a meaningful title.
control_wcag_notes: the document is missing bookmarks. If the PDF is longer than a few pages and has no bookmark panel, that's a failure, users (including screen reader users) have no way to jump between sections.

control_pdfua_notes: there's at least one element in the PDF that's using an incorrect or invalid tag type.
control_wcag_notes: WCAG Failures,1.3 Adaptable 2 failures, there are two places where the visual structure of the document isn't reflected in the tags. 1.4 Distinguishable, 5  instances of text that doesn't meet the 4.5:1 (normal text) or 3:1 (large text) contrast ratio. 4.1 Compatible The 6 warnings likely mean there are interactive elements (links, form fields, or buttons) where the accessible name or role isn't quite right but isn't definitively broken
